title: Pufferfish API
description: A simple API to allow easy multi-version and multi-loader development.
body:
# Pufferfish API

[![Java CI with Gradle](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/Pufferfish-API/actions/workflows/build-neo-26.1.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/Pufferfish-API/actions/workflows/build-neo-26.1.yml) ![GitHub repo size](https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/Octagon-Modding/Pufferfish-API) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/3d9M7tAN?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&color=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pufferfish-api)
 [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1205309?logo=curseforge&logoColor=black&label=CurseForge%20Downloads&labelColor=cc7000&color=blue)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pufferfish-api)

Pufferfish API is a library mod that makes it easier to develop multi-version and multi-loader mods with a single codebase. This is primarily built for my mods (excluding BTA), so stuff could break at any time, and you probably shouldn't build your own mods on top of this. This also doesn't add any content, so you should only install it if one of your mods depends on this.

## Currently supported Minecraft versions and loaders:

## Mods built with Pufferfish API:

- [The Pro's Game](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-pros-game)

### Contribution Guide:
If you would like to contribute to The Pro's Game, please check out our [GitHub](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/Pufferfish-API)

This mod is licensed under the MIT license, meaning you are free to distribute this mod and modify it as you see fit, including for commercial purposes, however no warranty is provided and I will not be held liable for anything in regards to this mod.
